CREATE TABLE xml_templates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content XML);
CREATE TABLE employees (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), department VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'Engineering');
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Marketing');
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Alice', 'age', '30'], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Bob', 'department', 'Marketing'], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Charlie', 'age', '25'], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Greg', 'department', 'Sales'], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Alice', 'age', NULL], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', '', 'department', ''], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xml_template(content, ARRAY['name', 'Eve', 'department', 'Engineering'], ? ) FROM xml_templates WHERE id = 2;
